title: Seeji - Design studio for early-stage AI Products
search_path_label: 采购 / 招投标 / Marketplace 路径
full_text:
Seeji - Design studio for early-stage AI Products
Design Studio
Design Studio
Design Studio
We partner with startup founders to craft, elevate, and validate product experiences people trust.
We partner with startup founders to craft, elevate, and validate product experiences people trust.
Why Work With Us
Why Work With Us
Top-tier Service. Founder-friendly pricing.
Top-tier Service. Founder-friendly pricing.
Top-tier Service. Founder-friendly pricing.
With 14+ years each, we’ve shaped products and brands for Autodesk, Meta, Twitter, Wells Fargo, Pinterest, and agencies like Btrax, R/GA, Ueno, AKQA, and Metalab. Now, we bring that expertise to early-stage founders—big-league quality, smarter spend.
With 14+ years each, we’ve shaped products and brands for Autodesk, Meta, Twitter, Wells Fargo, Pinterest, and agencies like Btrax, R/GA, Ueno, AKQA, and Metalab. Now, we bring that expertise to early-stage founders—big-league quality, smarter spend.
With 14+ years each, we’ve shaped products and brands for Autodesk, Meta, Twitter, Wells Fargo, Pinterest, and agencies like Btrax, R/GA, Ueno, AKQA, and Metalab. Now, we bring that expertise to early-stage founders—big-league quality, smarter spend.

Customer Review
Trusted By Founders
Trusted By Founders
Fu Jou Chen
Founder @Bon L'ete
Seeji took my ideas and turned them into a stunning, on-brand website—beautiful, intuitive, and built to perform. They made the process smooth and collaborative with clear guidance, and the site has already boosted my brand’s presence and impressed my customers.
I couldn’t be happier and highly recommend Seeji to anyone looking to elevate their online presence.
Vasudha Badri-Paul
Founder @Avatara AI
Seeji brought clarity to our GTM product from day one. Jessie guided us in articulating a PRD and used it to align founder, advisors, and engineering on a focused MVP. Her wireframes and a few polished core screens turned vision into concrete UX, her 1-on-1s with engineering nailed the nuanced AI interactions, and her quick competitive audit clarified our positioning. Thanks to Seeji, we gained the clarity and design assets our dev team needed to hit the ground running.
Vasudha Badri-Paul
Founder @Avatara AI
Seeji brought clarity to our GTM product from day one. Jessie guided us in articulating a PRD and used it to align founder, advisors, and engineering on a focused MVP. Her wireframes and a few polished core screens turned vision into concrete UX, her 1-on-1s with engineering nailed the nuanced AI interactions, and her quick competitive audit clarified our positioning. Thanks to Seeji, we gained the clarity and design assets our dev team needed to hit the ground running.
Tim Eun
Founder & CEO @Socratics.ai
Seeji embedded quickly with our team and added value immediately giving actionable feedback on product direction and story that derisked our pilot.
They delivered a sharp UX audit with refined mockups that made our MVP more intuitive and investor-ready.

Pricing Structure
Pricing
We offer custom pricing for teams with specialized needs outside our listed packages—enterprise projects, rapid pivots, or standalone UX work.
Book a scope call
Book a scope call
Marketing Website
For founders who need an on-brand website that attracts customers and builds credibility.
Timeline: 4 weeks.
Product - MVP
For founders ready to validate their idea and create an MVP that wins pilot customers and stands out to investors.
Timeline: 6-8 weeks
Design Partner
Recurring engagements with a steady cadence—ideal for startups needing hands-on design support each week.
Fractional Head of UX.

We partner with startup founders to craft, elevate, and validate product experiences people trust.

Why Work With Us
Why Work With Us
Top-tier Service. Founder-friendly pricing.

Top-tier Service. Founder-friendly pricing.
With 14+ years each, we’ve shaped products and brands for Autodesk, Meta, Twitter, Wells Fargo, Pinterest, and agencies like Btrax, R/GA, Ueno, AKQA, and Metalab. Now, we bring that expertise to early-stage founders—big-league quality, smarter spend.
